findings.issue: Insufficient or non-existent consent flow for automated decision-making
findings.recommended_fix: Implement explicit consent flow for automated decision-making, ensuring compliance with GDPR Article 22
Conduct thorough review of AZ Personal Data Protection Act requirements and ensure compliance before launch

findings.issue: Insufficient consideration of legal exposure for AURA score usage in hiring decisions
findings.recommended_fix: Develop clear guidelines and disclaimers for AURA score usage, ensuring compliance with relevant laws and regulations

findings.issue: Potential gaps in DPAs with Supabase, Google Cloud, and Railway
findings.recommended_fix: Review and update DPAs with all data processors to ensure compliance with GDPR and other relevant regulations
